items.title: Bobby Cox WANTED SMOKE with Andruw Jones 😳
items.body_excerpt: Bobby Cox wasn't playing games, even with his biggest star 😳 The legendary Braves manager yanked Andruw Jones mid-inning... and it changed his career.
